data.name: After deletion, you may still be able to log in again, which will create a new account with no data. To permanently delete your account, please visit your auth provider.
data.value: After deletion, you may still be able to log in again, which will create a new account with no data. To permanently delete your account, please visit your auth provider.

data.name: Are you sure you want to delete all your data?
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all your data?

data.name: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?

data.name: This action will permanently erase all your data from our servers. Your comments, likes, and favorites will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
data.value: This action will permanently erase all your data from our servers. Your comments, likes, and favourites will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: This action will permanently erase your profile and all associated data from our servers. This action cannot be undone.
data.value: This action will permanently erase your profile and all associated data from our servers. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: To prevent breaking downstream dependencies or losing team assets, you must manually delete them or transfer their ownership to another user before you can delete your account.
data.value: To prevent breaking downstream dependencies or losing team assets, you must manually delete them or transfer their ownership to another user before you can delete your account.

data.name: Your account is synced from an external authentication provider. Deleting your data here will remove all your local records, but your account may be recreated the next time you log in. To permanently delete your account, please visit your
data.value: Your account is synced from an external authentication provider. Deleting your data here will remove all your local records, but your account may be recreated the next time you log in. To permanently delete your account, please visit your
